---
---

Hi, I'm Quy—an Applied Data Scientist. I'm from Hanoi, Vietnam 🇻🇳. Currently living in Singapore 🇸🇬.

I love building products that help people make better decisions.

My projects:

- [Calens](https://www.calens.dev): a Chrome extension for Google Calendar Analytics.
- [qrec](https://github.com/dvquy13/qrec): Open-source Project for Claude Code history management
- [RecSys End-to-End Implementation Series](index.qmd#category=implement-recsys-series)

I used to teach a RecSys course for practitioners at [FullStackDataScience](https://fullstackdatascience.com/courses/igds).
